---
title: "Streamflow Example"
author: "Rebeca Adam"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)

# read in the data
p301 <- read.csv(here("week 1", "p301.csv"))

#aggregate by water year
p301_yearly <- p301 |>
  group_by(wy) |>
  summarize(total_streamflow = sum(streamflow),
            total_precip = sum(precip),
            percent_streamflow = (total_streamflow/total_precip) * 100)

#calc mean, range, and SD of percent streamflow accross the year
mean(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow)
range(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow)
sd(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow)

```

to exit the terminal after doing "git revert HEAD" 1. hit : then type wq and hit enter

<<<<<<< HEAD
Change
=======
to exit the terminal after doing "git revert HEAD"
1. hit : then type wq and hit enter







>>>>>>> 59667e36661db0a08b411f1528cd6cddd9c46fc7
